entities.name: Matrix
entities.context: A framework used to categorize problems based on simplicity and complexity.

entities.name: BEST
entities.context: Represents the optimal choice in simple and easy problems.

entities.name: GOOD
entities.context: Indicates a decent choice in simple but hard problems.

entities.name: TRAP
entities.context: Represents a poor choice in complex and hard problems.

entities.name: AVOID
entities.context: Represents an option to be steered clear of in complex and hard problems.

relationships.context: BEST is a choice within the Matrix framework.
GOOD is a choice within the Matrix framework.
TRAP is a choice within the Matrix framework.
AVOID is a choice within the Matrix framework.
